Richer than the recent marathon tags.

bosses.name: Euryale the Snake Goddess

taunts: You will regret this for many years to come.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Euryale the Snake Goddess', chat_39-40). Taunt right-edge cut at 'for many...' -> PARTIAL. A snake/GORGON-sister boss (Euryale = one of the 3 Gorgons w/ Stheno+Medusa). BASE-vs-ROTF-CUSTOM UNCERTAIN: base RotMG has 'Stheno the Snake Queen' (built) + Medusa, but 'Euryale the Snake Goddess' is not a confirmed base name -> possibly ROTF-CUSTOM (a Stheno sister); verify before building. bosses.name: Mad Jester
taunts: It's time... for the Ultimate Show!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (f_156). A 2nd Mad Jester line (1st was disc_lHWOmAlg-ag 'To destroy these humans, all it takes is a bit of little magic and a lot of determination. I have BOTH!'). Oryx summons it as the 'TRUE FOOL' (see below). Mad Jester base-vs-custom still UNCERTAIN (event boss). ENRICHES the Mad Jester line set.

bosses.name: Oryx the Mad God (realm announcer)
taunts: Silly fools, I have summoned the TRUE FOOL!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (f_156). BASE-GAME Oryx realm line summoning the Mad Jester ('TRUE FOOL') -> canonical Oryx flavour, not ROTF-custom. Links Oryx -> Mad Jester event.

bosses.name: The Forgotten King
taunts: You have made a grave mistake coming... reclaim my place in the Realm.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. BASE-GAME (Shatters / realm Forgotten King) -> CANONICAL, not ROTF-custom (cf. the boss-the-forgotten-king NO-BUILD). Corroboration only.
